title: $JS_BASE_URL
text: $JS_BASE_URL Specify the URL where JavaScript files for dynamic server pages are located at runtime. $JS_BASE_URL { = } URL Values URL —relative path from the web server root to the location of the DSP JavaScript files at runtime Defaults Assignment file: wasv.asn Section: [WEB] Default value: ../common/dspjs Description By default, Uniface expects to find a component's .js file, whether copied during deployment or generated on-the-fly, in the ../common/dspjs directory relative to the page's base URL. For example, in the default installation, this would be: http://localhost:8080/uniface/wrd/../common/dspjs . You use the $JS_BASE_URL setting to specify a different URL (relative or absolute) in your Uniface Server's assignment file ( wasv.asn in the standard installation). Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
